title: ficus elastica var. minor
intro: Ficus elastica var. minor, also known as the 'Rubber Plantlet', is a small cultivar of the Ficus elastica, a species of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The Ficus elastica var. minor is also believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, promoting sleep, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the Ficus elastica var. minor can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, which can be used as a tea, tincture, or topical application.
